institution_examples.title: AI Competency Framework for Students

korea_bridge.title: 2025년부터 학교현장에 AI 디지털교과서 도입

manual_research_checklist: BBC / Royal Observatory 원문 전문 확인
Royal Observatory 관계자 발언 맥락 확인
AI 즉답/검색 사용이 학습 습관에 미치는 영향 관련 보조 자료 확인
학교/박물관/천문관/과학관의 AI 활용 또는 AI 리터러시 사례 확인
AI가 학습 접근성을 높인다는 반대 관점 확인
국내 학교 AI 교육 정책 확인
국내 과학관/박물관 AI 교육/전시 사례 확인

primary_article.summary: Paddy Rodgers said the Observatory's rich history showed the power of human knowledge and the need to avoid "dependence" on AI.
primary_article.title: Instant AI answers can trivialise human intelligence, warns Royal Observatory

research_or_survey.summary: Synthesizes evidence on GenAI as tutor, partner, and assistant, while noting that benefits depend on clear teaching principles.
research_or_survey.title: OECD Digital Education Outlook 2026

supporting_articles.summary: Generative-AI-mediated inquiry may reshape the diversity of knowledge encountered in online information seeking.
supporting_articles.title: From Searchable to Non-Searchable: Generative AI and Information Diversity

supporting_articles.summary: UNESCO frames AI in education as both a rights/safety issue and a source of opportunities such as access and personalized learning.
supporting_articles.title: AI and education: Protecting the rights of learners
